description: Template playbook grammar. Copy this file, rename it (e.g. train_<name>.json), and edit 'playbook'. The implicit-nested schema: a nested OBJECT is a node (its keys are the routes you can descend into), a LIST is a command leaf (runnable shell commands), a STRING is an answer leaf (plain text). Use single-word route names. Train at start-up (add to INIT_KNOWLEDGE_FILES) or in-flight with: /read <file>.json. Navigate with /play <path...>; run a command leaf with /cmd <path...>. The legacy flat 'routines' form below still works as one-level routes.
